name: AddressBook
tagline: NPC & location finder for TBC Anniversary with TomTom integration
description: Find any NPC in Azeroth and Outland. Browse 4,300+ quest givers, trainers, flight masters, innkeepers, and vendors organized by category, or search by name and zone. Set TomTom waypoints with a single click and record your own custom locations.

features.title: 4,300+ Locations
features.description: Pre-populated database of quest givers, trainers, flight masters, innkeepers, vendors, and more.

features.title: Category Browser
features.description: Organized tree of NPC types with continent and zone filtering. Auto-detects your current zone.

features.title: Search
features.description: Search across all categories by NPC name, zone, or description.

features.title: TomTom Integration
features.description: One-click waypoint navigation to any NPC location with TomTom support.

features.title: Custom Entries
features.description: Record your own locations with /ab record and manage favorites.

features.title: Faction-Aware
features.description: Filters results to show only NPCs available to your faction.

screenshots.alt: AddressBook main window showing NPC categories and search
screenshots.caption: Browse and search 4,300+ NPCs across Azeroth and Outland
